audit_main_conclusion: 25.15 label-v3 relieved near-empty masks but converted the failure into union-like merged masks: soft/valid support is too broad relative to component identity, while raw labels remain sufficient for a stricter v3b derivation.

cause_ranking.evidence: v3 soft OR expands well beyond raw union while 25.15 merged rate is global
component valid/soft regions overlap across components, including separated/close rows

cause_ranking.cause: SDF identity too weak in multi-valid boundary zones
cause_ranking.evidence: multiple component valid regions include near-boundary SDF pixels for more than one component
component depth valid region leakage would indicate target-side depth dilution
would require merged collapse to be concentrated in touching/overlap only
not supported: predicted component count remains non-empty and all hard slices merge

decision_reasons: existing raw component masks/depths and ownership map are sufficient
v3 soft/valid regions are too permissive and can be tightened inside PINN_project
depth-valid targets are raw-foreground only, so depth degradation is more likely downstream from merged masks than missing raw labels
route_decision: A. enter 25.16 label-v3b derivation + validator, no training

schema_v3b_recommendation.boundary_halo_region: Limit soft halo to a narrow boundary band; do not let halo dominate component-local supervision.
schema_v3b_recommendation.component_exclusive_hard_core: Keep a mutually exclusive hard core from ownership-resolved raw component masks.
schema_v3b_recommendation.depth_target: Supervise component depth only on hard core plus narrow owned boundary; do not supervise depth over broad soft halo.
schema_v3b_recommendation.ignore_overlap_region: Pixels where multiple components claim soft/valid support should be ignored or diagnostic unless ownership confidence is explicit.
schema_v3b_recommendation.sdf_identity: Compute SDF from raw hard component mask but mask SDF loss by component-exclusive core plus narrow non-overlapping halo.
schema_v3b_recommendation.three_component_flags: Keep component_count=3, overlap_region, contact_boundary, and topology flags as required slices.
schema_v3b_recommendation.union_policy: Union mask/depth remain evaluation-only and must not become component-local supervision.
schema_v3b_recommendation.valid_region_split: Split valid_region into hard_core_region, boundary_halo_region, and ignore_overlap_region.
